name: Platformer Push (two-body crate push proof)
description: Reuse proof for the 1.4.0 two-body PUSH (the resolveBodies push step, INDIE-ROADMAP Tier-1): a player shoves pushable crate colliders horizontally — into a wall (the crate stops flush, the pusher stops behind it), off a ledge (the crate falls into a pit under gravity), and a 2-crate chain (both crates move; wall-blocked, the chain compresses and the pusher stops behind it). Built from move-platformer + velocity + collider with no host code.
